column1: # disarm transliteration-quality fixtures — Phase-0 CER/WER baseline (issue #173, epic #326)
# `standard` records the romanization target the `reference` is written against,
# scheme families are used here on purpose:
#   disarm-default  reference == disarm's own documented default output. Error is
#                   expected to be ~0; these rows are a DRIFT / REGRESSION sentinel
#                   — they exist to prove the #38 split changes no behaviour, not
#   english-common  reference == an established English exonym / conventional
#                   legitimately differs; these rows record an HONEST non-zero gap
#                   so the harness is demonstrably measuring, not asserting "0.0".
# This is a SMALL, offline, hand-curated set (a Phase-0 baseline), NOT the full
# Dakshina/uroman/ICU comparison or the abjad CCPD indicators — those remain the
# scope of #173. Keep it deterministic: no external downloads.
# Lines beginning with '#' and blank lines are ignored by the harness.
# ── Latin diacritics — core tier, disarm-default scheme ──
# ── Honest non-zero gap: established English spellings differ from the phonetic default ──
